sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Whoever plants will harvest».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ نَتِيجَةَ أَعْمَالِنَا تَعُودُ إِلَيْنَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da se rezultati naših djela vraćaju nama.
sentences.translationEn: This means that the results of our actions return to us.

sentences.translation: Djevojčica je posijala sjeme u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: The little girl planted a seed in the garden.

sentences.arabic: سَقَتْهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ حَتَّى نَمَتْ وَأَصْبَحَتْ شَجَرَةً.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan ju je zalijevala dok nije naraslo i postalo stablo.
sentences.translationEn: She watered it every day until it grew and became a tree.
